_description: Higgsfield quality memory. Stores generation quality failures, model-specific issues, and confirmed fixes.

entries.scenario: Multi-shot character sequence — close-up to wide transition
entries.original_prompt: A detective in a grey coat walks through a rainy alley. Camera transitions from close-up to wide establishing shot.
entries.failure_description: Character face changed significantly between close-up and wide shot. Coat color shifted from grey to dark blue.
entries.fix_applied: Switched to Kling 3.0 for character-driven sequences. Added explicit character description anchoring in each shot.
entries.improved_prompt: A male detective, 45, weathered face, grey wool overcoat, walks through a rain-soaked alley. Camera: Dolly Out from medium close-up to wide. Grey overcoat, same face throughout.

entries.scenario: VHS style not rendering — output looked modern/clean
entries.original_prompt: A woman walks down a hallway. VHS style.
entries.failure_description: Output was clean digital look with no VHS artifacts. The style instruction was too vague.
entries.fix_applied: Added explicit VHS artifact descriptions: scan lines, color bleed, tracking noise, 4:3 aspect ratio, desaturated greens.
entries.improved_prompt: A woman walks down a dimly lit hallway. Style: VHS. Visible scan lines, slight color bleed on edges, tracking noise at bottom of frame, desaturated green-grey tones, 4:3 aspect ratio, practical fluorescent light only.

entries.scenario: Image-to-video produced near-static output — barely any movement
entries.original_prompt: A woman in a red dress stands on a balcony overlooking the city at sunset. She has dark hair and brown eyes. The city has tall buildings. The sky is orange and pink.
entries.failure_description: Output was essentially a still image with minimal breathing motion. No meaningful animation.
entries.fix_applied: Removed redundant static descriptions (already visible in the input image). Added explicit motion cues and camera movement.
entries.improved_prompt: Starting from the provided image. Her hair lifts gently in the evening breeze. She turns her head slowly to the right, a slight smile forming. Camera: slow Dolly In toward her profile. Wind catches the dress fabric.

entries.scenario: Prompt with contradictory camera instructions produced incoherent movement
entries.original_prompt: Camera Dolly In toward the subject while pulling back to reveal the environment. FPV Drone weaving through the market. 360 Orbit around the fighter.
entries.failure_description: Three contradictory camera movements in one prompt. Output had erratic, jarring camera path that looked broken.
entries.fix_applied: One camera movement per shot. Split into separate generations if multiple movements needed.
entries.improved_prompt: Camera: FPV Drone weaving through the crowded night market at speed, following the woman in the tactical jacket.

entries.scenario: Lip-sync failed — audio and mouth movement completely out of sync
entries.original_prompt: Character says 'We need to leave now' while nodding vigorously and turning head side to side. Background music plays.
entries.failure_description: Head motion tokens competed with lip-sync engine. Background music instruction triggered generative audio that replaced the dialogue.
entries.fix_applied: Removed all head/face motion tokens. Removed ambient/music tokens. Kept dialogue and camera only. Trimmed audio to 5s.
entries.improved_prompt: Character says: 'We need to leave now.' Framing: medium close-up, locked-off camera. Urgent expression.
